title: Sqlitelogictest - Algebra operators priority in select query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 INT, value3 INT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 85, 52), (2, 50, 82);
SELECT value1 * value2 + IFNULL(value3, 0) * -1 FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (value1 * value2) + (IFNULL(value3, 0) * 0) FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: Algebra operators priority in select query
